test.name: Verify that user should be able to set Timecard punch type as Hours in Hospital settings

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To HCS
Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.doc: Returns a list of WebElement objects matching the ``locator``.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Get Text
kw.doc: Returns the text value of the element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Exit For Loop
kw.doc: Stops executing the enclosing FOR loop.

kw.doc: Fails the test with the given message and optionally alters its tags.
